scenarios.description: No polecats active, everything healthy → idle or report

args.note: Rig hq quiet. No polecats active.

scenarios.description: Active healthy polecat → peek, monitor, or do nothing

scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_nudge", "args": {"target": "gastown/furiosa", "message": "Are you still working? No progress detected."}}

args.message: Are you still working? No progress detected.

scenarios.description: Completed polecat, clean git → nuke, close bead, verify git, or report
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "MERGE_READY: hq-3mn2", "body": "Polecat furiosa completed hq-3mn2. Branch merged and clean."}}

args.subject: MERGE_READY: hq-3mn2
args.body: Polecat furiosa completed hq-3mn2. Branch merged and clean.

scenarios.description: Crash-looping polecat → escalate or force nuke
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "ESCALATION: gastown/furiosa crash loop", "body": "furiosa has crashed 4 times (segfault). Needs intervention."}}

args.subject: ESCALATION: gastown/furiosa crash loop
args.body: furiosa has crashed 4 times (segfault). Needs intervention.

scenarios.description: Completed but unpushed work → escalate, NOT nuke
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "RECOVERY_NEEDED: gastown/furiosa has unpushed work", "body": "Polecat furiosa has unpushed work on gastown/furiosa. Branch feature/

args.subject: RECOVERY_NEEDED: gastown/furiosa has unpushed work
args.body: Polecat furiosa has unpushed work on gastown/furiosa. Branch feature/fix-auth. Bead hq-3mn2 needs reassignment.

scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "ESCALATION: gastown infrastructure down", "body": "Both deacon and refinery are down on gastown. Immediate attention required."}}

args.subject: ESCALATION: gastown infrastructure down
args.body: Both deacon and refinery are down on gastown. Immediate attention required.

scenarios.description: Idle rig with routine mail → respond or report idle
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "ORPHANED: bead hq-3mn2 has no polecat", "body": "Bead hq-3mn2 is in_progress on branch feature/command-palette but no polecat is as

args.subject: ORPHANED: bead hq-3mn2 has no polecat
args.body: Bead hq-3mn2 is in_progress on branch feature/command-palette but no polecat is assigned. Needs reassignment.

scenarios.description: POLECAT_DONE in inbox → send MERGE_READY to refinery
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "gastown/refinery", "subject": "MERGE_READY: bcc-8rlwh", "body": "Polecat furiosa completed bcc-8rlwh. Branch feature/fix-auth pushed and clean."}}

args.subject: MERGE_READY: bcc-8rlwh
args.body: Polecat furiosa completed bcc-8rlwh. Branch feature/fix-auth pushed and clean.

scenarios.description: Lifecycle shutdown → verify git state or nuke
MERGED notification + cleanup wisp → close cleanup bead
HELP request → escalate to mayor or read details
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "HELP from bcc/rust: Build failing on dependency re", "body": "Polecat rust needs help: Build failing on dependency resolution. Work

args.subject: HELP from bcc/rust: Build failing on dependency re
args.body: Polecat rust needs help: Build failing on dependency resolution. Working on hq-3mn2.

scenarios.description: Zombie polecat (running state, dead session) → escalate
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "RECOVERY: zombie polecat gastown/chrome", "body": "Agent chrome shows running but session bcc-wisp-gb0j5u is dead. Bead zfc-9qw1 ne

args.subject: RECOVERY: zombie polecat gastown/chrome
args.body: Agent chrome shows running but session bcc-wisp-gb0j5u is dead. Bead zfc-9qw1 needs reassignment.

scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_escalate", "args": {"severity": "HIGH", "message": "hq/refinery stuck spawning for 20min. Session hq-wisp-2v214 may need restart."}}

args.message: hq/refinery stuck spawning for 20min. Session hq-wisp-2v214 may need restart.

scenarios.description: Orphaned bead with no polecat → notify mayor
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "ORPHANED: bead bcc-8rlwh has no polecat", "body": "Bead bcc-8rlwh is in_progress on branch integration/beads-ide but no polecat is

args.subject: ORPHANED: bead bcc-8rlwh has no polecat
args.body: Bead bcc-8rlwh is in_progress on branch integration/beads-ide but no polecat is assigned. Needs reassignment.

scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "ESCALATION: gastown infrastructure down", "body": "Both deacon and refinery are down on gastown. Immediate attention required."}}

args.subject: ESCALATION: gastown infrastructure down
args.body: Both deacon and refinery are down on gastown. Immediate attention required.
